title: Uruguayan Beef Stew
description: A hearty beef stew from Uruguay, slow-cooked to perfection. Tender beef and smoky flavors make this a comforting dish.
instructions: Brown the beef in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the chili powder, tomato paste, and smoke paprika. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the stew and red wine. Stir to combine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 1/2 hours.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
